summary: Completed comprehensive testing of B21 Security website. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with one minor UX issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Form fields not cleared after successful submission (success message shows but form retains values)

passed_tests: All 11 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Home page loads with B21 Security branding and correct phone number (+44 7943 715313)
All navigation links functional (About, Services, Industries, Pricing, Careers, Contact)
Services page displays all 7 services including Dog Handling/K9 Security
Quote form submits successfully with proper form clearing
Contact form submits successfully with success message
Career application form exists with CV upload functionality
FAQ accordion functional on Contact page
Dog Handling/K9 Security service properly implemented and visible
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UX improvement: Update contact form to clear fields after successful submission (currently shows success message but doesn't clear form fields)
